class.name: RichTextEditToolbar
class.brief_description: Toolbar with common formatting controls for [RichTextEdit].
class.description: [RichTextEditToolbar] provides common formatting controls for a [RichTextEdit]. It includes controls for bold, italic, underline, strikethrough, font size, foreground color, background color, outline color and width, quote blocks, alignment, indentation, URL links, and lists. Assign [member rich_text_edit_path] to the [RichTextEdit] to format. If the path is empty, the toolbar looks for a sibling [RichTextEdit] when it enters the scene tree. The font size control follows the target editor's caret position. The color picker preview changes while it is open and commits the final color as a single undoable formatting action when the popup closes. [codeblock] # Scene tree: # VBoxContainer # RichTextEditToolbar # RichTextEdit # # If both nodes are siblings, RichTextEditToolbar can find RichTextEdit automatically. [/codeblock]

method.name: get_rich_text_edit
method.description: Returns the [RichTextEdit] currently controlled by this toolbar, or [code]null[/code] if no target is available.

members.member: Path to the [RichTextEdit] controlled by this toolbar. Leave this empty to use the first sibling [RichTextEdit] found in the scene tree.

theme_items.theme_item: Icon for the alignment dropdown button.
Icon for the center alignment dropdown item.
Icon for the left alignment dropdown item.
Icon for the right alignment dropdown item.
Icon for the bold formatting button.
Icon for the decrease indent button.
Icon for the increase indent button.
Icon for the italic formatting button.
Icon for the URL link button.
Icon for the ordered list button.
Icon for the quote button.
Icon for the strikethrough formatting button.
Icon for the underline formatting button.
Icon for the unordered list button.
StyleBox for toolbar buttons while hovered.
StyleBox for toolbar buttons in their normal state.
StyleBox for toolbar buttons while pressed.
StyleBox for color picker buttons while hovered.
StyleBox for color picker buttons in their normal state.
StyleBox for color picker buttons while pressed.
StyleBox for toolbar dropdown panels.
StyleBox for the toolbar background.
